item.title: Forging Angle Iron Container
item.description: A blacksmithing project showing how angle iron is shaped and forged into a functional container, highlighting traditional metalworking techniques and craftsmanship.

media:content.media:title: Forging Angle Iron Container
media:content.media:description: A blacksmithing project showing how angle iron is shaped and forged into a functional container, highlighting traditional metalworking techniques and craftsmanship.

item.title: Forging an Essential Vise
item.description: A blacksmithing project demonstrating how a functional vise is forged, showcasing precision metalwork, tool-making skills, and traditional shop craftsmanship.

media:content.media:title: Forging an Essential Vise
media:content.media:description: A blacksmithing project demonstrating how a functional vise is forged, showcasing precision metalwork, tool-making skills, and traditional shop craftsmanship.

item.title: Building an Adjustable Forged Tool
item.description: A blacksmithing project showing the design and forging of an adjustable tool, highlighting precision craftsmanship, metal shaping, and traditional fabrication techniques.

media:content.media:title: Building an Adjustable Forged Tool
media:content.media:description: A blacksmithing project showing the design and forging of an adjustable tool, highlighting precision craftsmanship, metal shaping, and traditional fabrication techniques.

item.title: Cable Damascus Axe Forging
item.description: A blacksmithing project forging a cable Damascus axe, showcasing layered steel patterning, heat treatment, and traditional blade-making craftsmanship.

media:content.media:title: Cable Damascus Axe Forging
media:content.media:description: A blacksmithing project forging a cable Damascus axe, showcasing layered steel patterning, heat treatment, and traditional blade-making craftsmanship.

item.title: Axe Making from Wire Rope
item.description: A blacksmithing project transforming wire rope into a forged axe, highlighting cable Damascus steel patterns, heat treatment, and traditional blade craftsmanship.

media:content.media:title: Axe Making from Wire Rope
media:content.media:description: A blacksmithing project transforming wire rope into a forged axe, highlighting cable Damascus steel patterns, heat treatment, and traditional blade craftsmanship.

item.title: Miner’s Candlestick Forging
item.description: A blacksmithing project inspired by traditional miner’s candlesticks, showcasing historical design, forged metalwork, and classic hand-forging techniques.

media:content.media:title: Miner’s Candlestick Forging
media:content.media:description: A blacksmithing project inspired by traditional miner’s candlesticks, showcasing historical design, forged metalwork, and classic hand-forging techniques.

item.title: Forging a Helpful Tool
item.description: A blacksmithing project demonstrating the forging of a practical everyday tool, highlighting craftsmanship, shaping techniques, and functional metalwork design.

media:content.media:title: Forging a Helpful Tool
media:content.media:description: A blacksmithing project demonstrating the forging of a practical everyday tool, highlighting craftsmanship, shaping techniques, and functional metalwork design.

item.title: Forging a Coffee Scoop
item.description: A blacksmithing project showing the creation of a handmade coffee scoop, highlighting shaping, finishing, and functional decorative metalwork.

media:content.media:title: Forging a Coffee Scoop
media:content.media:description: A blacksmithing project showing the creation of a handmade coffee scoop, highlighting shaping, finishing, and functional decorative metalwork.

item.title: Handmade Coffee Scoop Forging
item.description: A blacksmithing project crafting a coffee scoop from raw metal, showcasing shaping techniques, finishing work, and functional handmade design.

media:content.media:title: Handmade Coffee Scoop Forging
media:content.media:description: A blacksmithing project crafting a coffee scoop from raw metal, showcasing shaping techniques, finishing work, and functional handmade design.

item.title: Bending and Twisting Metal
item.description: A blacksmithing demonstration focused on bending and twisting metal, showcasing controlled forging techniques and traditional metal shaping skills.

media:content.media:title: Bending and Twisting Metal
media:content.media:description: A blacksmithing demonstration focused on bending and twisting metal, showcasing controlled forging techniques and traditional metal shaping skills.

item.title: Anvil Upgrade at Blacksmith Shop
item.description: A look at upgrading an anvil setup in the forge, improving workflow, stability, and efficiency for traditional blacksmithing projects.

media:content.media:title: Anvil Upgrade at Blacksmith Shop
media:content.media:description: A look at upgrading an anvil setup in the forge, improving workflow, stability, and efficiency for traditional blacksmithing projects.

item.title: Spring Butcher Tool Forging
item.description: A blacksmithing project creating a spring butcher tool, showcasing forging techniques, heat treatment, and functional tool-making craftsmanship.

media:content.media:title: Spring Butcher Tool Forging
media:content.media:description: A blacksmithing project creating a spring butcher tool, showcasing forging techniques, heat treatment, and functional tool-making craftsmanship.
